zh.lifeSummary: 當Julianna de Bardolf於大約1174年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，她的父親Lord Hugh Bardolf31歲，母親Isabel Condet34歲。她和Nicholas de Poyntz II至少有3個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Julianna de Bardolf于大约1174年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Lord Hugh Bardolf31岁，母亲Isabel Condet34岁。她和Nicholas de Poyntz II至少有3个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Julianna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern combination of the given names   Julie   and   Anna  , perhaps sometimes intended as a form of   Juliana .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Julianna de Bardolf was born about 1174, in Lincolnshire, England, her father, Lord Hugh Bardolf, was 31 and her mother, Isabel Condet, was 34. She had at least 3 sons with Nicholas de Poyntz II.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Julianna de Bardolf est née environ 1174, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Hugh Bardolf, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabel Condet, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Nicholas de Poyntz II.

de.lifeSummary: Als Julianna de Bardolf um 1174 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Hugh Bardolf 31 und ihre Mutter Isabel Condet 34. Sie hatte mit Nicholas de Poyntz II mindestens 3 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Julianna de Bardolf è nata il circa 1174 nel Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Lord Hugh Bardolf, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Isabel Condet, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Nicholas de Poyntz II.

ja.lifeSummary: Julianna de Bardolfが約1174年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lord Hugh Bardolfは31歳，母Isabel Condetは34歳であった。彼女はNicholas de Poyntz IIとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Julianna de Bardolf(이)가 대략 1174년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Hugh Bardolf(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Condet(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Nicholas de Poyntz II(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Julianna de Bardolf nasceu aproximadamente 1174, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Hugh Bardolf, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Condet, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Nicholas de Poyntz II.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Julianna de Bardolf родилась около 1174 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord Hugh Bardolf было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel Condet, 34. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Nicholas de Poyntz II.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Julianna de Bardolf nació aproximadamente 1174, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Hugh Bardolf, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Isabel Condet, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Nicholas de Poyntz II.
